description: Canonical declarative manifest for the AIMAS self-assembling creative workstation.

categories.name: System Preparation
categories.description: Update and upgrade system packages before installing anything.

categories.name: Base System Packages
categories.description: Core utilities, editors, media tools, and system libraries installed via apt.
commands: sudo apt-get install -y build-essential pkg-config make cmake git curl wget ca-certificates gnupg lsb-release software-properties-common unzip zip p7zip-full tar python3 python3-pip python3-venv python3-full pipx zsh fonts-powerline neovim vim nano less jq fzf tmux htop tree ncdu ffmpeg imagemagick bat cmatrix lolcat figlet cowsay nmap netcat-openbsd aircrack-ng ansible obs-studio shotcut kdenlive handbrake audacity gimp inkscape blender krita libreoffice ranger fd-find ripgrep libgl1 libglib2.0-0 libsm6 libxext6 libxrender-dev libgomp1 libvulkan1 linux-headers-generic systemd btop aria2 stow mpv
if command -v batcat >/dev/null 2>&1 && ! command -v bat >/dev/null 2>&1; then sudo ln -sf $(command -v batcat) /usr/local/bin/bat || true; fi
if command -v fdfind >/dev/null 2>&1 && ! command -v fd >/dev/null 2>&1; then sudo ln -sf $(command -v fdfind) /usr/local/bin/fd || true; fi

categories.name: UV (Python Sanity Layer)
categories.description: Installs uv, the modern Python package manager.
commands: if ! command -v uv >/dev/null 2>&1; then curl -LsSf https://astral.sh/uv/install.sh | sh; fi

categories.name: NVM & Node.js LTS
categories.description: Installs Node Version Manager and the latest LTS Node.js.

categories.name: Rustup & Cargo
categories.description: Installs the Rust toolchain.
commands: if ! command -v cargo >/dev/null 2>&1; then curl --proto '=https' --tlsv1.2 -sSf https://sh.rustup.rs | sh -s -- -y; fi

categories.name: Go
categories.description: Installs the Go programming language.
commands: if ! command -v go >/dev/null 2>&1; then GO_VER="1.23.4"; curl -LO "https://go.dev/dl/go${GO_VER}.linux-amd64.tar.gz"; sudo rm -rf /usr/local/go; sudo tar -C /usr/local -xzf "go${GO_VER}.linux-amd64.tar.gz"; rm -f "go${GO_VER}.linux-amd64.tar.gz"; export PATH="${PATH}:/usr/local/go/bin"; fi

categories.name: Docker Engine
categories.description: Installs official Docker CE with compose plugin.
commands: sudo apt-get remove -y docker.io docker-compose docker-compose-v2 docker-doc podman-docker containerd runc 2>/dev/null || true
sudo apt-get install -y docker-ce docker-ce-cli containerd.io docker-buildx-plugin docker-compose-plugin

categories.name: kubectl
categories.description: Kubernetes CLI.
commands: if ! command -v kubectl >/dev/null 2>&1; then curl -fsSL https://pkgs.k8s.io/core:/stable:/v1.32/deb/Release.key | sudo gpg --dearmor -o /etc/apt/keyrings/kubernetes-apt-keyring.gpg; echo 'deb [signed-by=/etc/apt/keyrings/kubernetes-apt-keyring.gpg] https://pkgs.k8s.io/core:/stable:/v1.32/deb/ /' | sudo tee /etc/apt/sources.list.d/kubernetes.list; sudo apt-get update; sudo apt-get install -y kubectl; fi

categories.name: Terraform
categories.description: Infrastructure-as-code tool.
commands: if ! command -v terraform >/dev/null 2>&1; then curl -fsSL https://apt.releases.hashicorp.com/gpg | sudo gpg --dearmor -o /etc/apt/keyrings/hashicorp.gpg || true; sudo apt-add-repository "deb [arch=amd64] https://apt.releases.hashicorp.com $(lsb_release -cs) main" -y; sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y terraform; fi

categories.name: AWS CLI
categories.description: Amazon Web Services command line interface.
commands: if ! command -v aws >/dev/null 2>&1; then curl "https://awscli.amazonaws.com/awscli-exe-linux-x86_64.zip" -o "awscliv2.zip"; unzip -o awscliv2.zip; sudo ./aws/install; rm -rf aws awscliv2.zip; fi

categories.name: Ollama (Local LLM Runtime)
categories.description: Runs open-source LLMs locally. CPU-friendly.
commands: if ! command -v ollama >/dev/null 2>&1; then curl -fsSL https://ollama.com/install.sh | sh; fi
if pidof systemd >/dev/null 2>&1; then sudo systemctl enable ollama; sudo systemctl start ollama; fi

categories.name: Shell Enhancements
categories.description: Zsh, Oh-My-Zsh, Starship, Zoxide.
commands: if [ "$SHELL" != "$(command -v zsh)" ]; then chsh -s "$(command -v zsh)" || true; fi
if ! command -v starship >/dev/null 2>&1; then curl -sS https://starship.rs/install.sh | sh -s -- -y; fi
if ! command -v zoxide >/dev/null 2>&1; then curl -sS https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ajeetdsouza/zoxide/main/install.sh | bash; fi

categories.name: Rust-based Terminal Tools
categories.description: Modern replacements for ls, du, ps, etc.

categories.name: Go-based Tools
categories.description: Lazygit, ghq, mods, gum, gdu, viddy, fd.

categories.name: Isolated Python CLI Apps (pipx)
categories.description: Python tools installed in isolated environments.

categories.name: Global npm Tools
categories.description: AI CLIs and dev tools installed globally via npm.

categories.name: Deno
categories.description: Secure JavaScript/TypeScript runtime built on Rust.
commands: if ! command -v deno >/dev/null 2>&1; then curl -fsSL https://deno.land/install.sh | sh; fi

categories.name: Bun
categories.description: Fast JavaScript all-in-one toolkit.
commands: if ! command -v bun >/dev/null 2>&1; then curl -fsSL https://bun.sh/install | bash; fi

categories.name: SDKMAN!
categories.description: Java/JVM ecosystem version manager.

categories.name: Python AI/ML Libraries (uv venv)
categories.description: CPU-only PyTorch, TensorFlow, transformers, Jupyter, etc.
commands: uv pip install --python ${HOME}/.local/share/aimas/venvs/ai-ml/bin/python torch torchvision torchaudio --index-url https://download.pytorch.org/whl/cpu tensorflow-cpu transformers datasets accelerate sentence-transformers diffusers openai anthropic huggingface-hub jupyterlab ipython ipywidgets numpy pandas matplotlib seaborn scikit-learn scipy opencv-python Pillow rembg onnxruntime tqdm rich || true

categories.name: Python Scraping Tools (uv venv)
categories.description: BeautifulSoup, Scrapy, Selenium, Playwright, etc.
commands: uv pip install --python ${HOME}/.local/share/aimas/venvs/scrape/bin/python beautifulsoup4 scrapy selenium requests httpx aiohttp playwright yt-dlp gallery-dl newspaper3k trafilatura brozzler hakrawler waybackpack fake-useragent scrapy-fake-useragent || true

categories.name: Python AI CLI Agents (uv venv)
categories.description: Aider, ShellGPT, Open Interpreter, Litellm, CrewAI, etc.
commands: uv pip install --python ${HOME}/.local/share/aimas/venvs/ai-cli/bin/python gpt4all shell-gpt aider-chat open-interpreter litellm par-gpt tgpt chatblade llm llm-ollama private-gpt crewai agentops langchain langchain-community langchain-ollama langchain-openai semantic-kernel haystack-ai smol-dev fastchat || true

categories.name: llama.cpp (CPU Build)
categories.description: Bare-metal local LLM inference engine.
commands: cd "${HOME}/llama.cpp" && git pull || true && make -j$(nproc) || true

categories.name: Standalone Binaries
categories.description: rclone, yt-dlp binary, LocalAI Docker, Open WebUI Docker.
commands: if ! command -v rclone >/dev/null 2>&1; then curl https://rclone.org/install.sh | sudo bash || true; fi
if ! command -v yt-dlp >/dev/null 2>&1; then sudo curl -L https://github.com/yt-dlp/yt-dlp/releases/latest/download/yt-dlp -o /usr/local/bin/yt-dlp && sudo chmod a+rx /usr/local/bin/yt-dlp; fi
docker run -d --name localai -p 8080:8080 --restart always localai/localai:latest-aio-cpu || true
docker run -d -p 3000:8080 -v open-webui:/app/backend/data --name open-webui --restart always ghcr.io/open-webui/open-webui:main || true

categories.name: Remote AI CLIs
categories.description: OpenCode and other remote AI assistants.

categories.name: Dotfiles & Shell Config
categories.description: Appends AIMAS configuration block to ~/.zshrc.
commands:
if ! grep -q "# == AIMAS BOOTSTRAP ==" "${HOME}/.zshrc" 2>/dev/null; then cat >> "${HOME}/.zshrc" << 'ZSHRC_BLOCK'

# == AIMAS BOOTSTRAP ==
export PATH="${HOME}/.local/bin:${HOME}/.cargo/bin:/usr/local/go/bin:${HOME}/go/bin:${PATH}"
export NVM_DIR="${HOME}/.nvm"
[ -s "${NVM_DIR}/nvm.sh" ] && \. "${NVM_DIR}/nvm.sh"
alias ls='eza --icons --group-directories-first 2>/dev/null || ls --color=auto'
alias ll='eza -la --icons --group-directories-first 2>/dev/null || ls -la --color=auto'
alias cat='bat --paging=never 2>/dev/null || cat'
alias top='btm 2>/dev/null || htop 2>/dev/null || top'
alias du='dust 2>/dev/null || du -sh'
alias ps='procs 2>/dev/null || ps'
alias find='fd 2>/dev/null || find'
alias grep='rg 2>/dev/null || grep'
alias cd='z 2>/dev/null || cd'
alias ..='cd ..'
alias ...='cd ../..'
alias gs='git status'
alias gp='git pull'
alias gl='git log --oneline -10'
alias dps='docker ps --format "table {{.Names}}\t{{.Status}}\t{{.Ports}}"'
alias dcu='docker compose up -d'
alias dcd='docker compose down'
alias oll='ollama list'
alias ollr='ollama run'
alias ai-ml='source ${HOME}/.local/share/aimas/venvs/ai-ml/bin/activate'
alias ai-cli='source ${HOME}/.local/share/aimas/venvs/ai-cli/bin/activate'
alias scrape='source ${HOME}/.local/share/aimas/venvs/scrape/bin/activate'
eval "$(zoxide init zsh 2>/dev/null || true)"
eval "$(starship init zsh 2>/dev/null || true)"
# == END AIMAS ==
ZSHRC_BLOCK; fi

all_commands_flat: sudo apt-get install -y build-essential pkg-config make cmake git curl wget ca-certificates gnupg lsb-release software-properties-common unzip zip p7zip-full tar python3 python3-pip python3-venv python3-full pipx zsh fonts-powerline neovim vim nano less jq fzf tmux htop tree ncdu ffmpeg imagemagick bat cmatrix lolcat figlet cowsay nmap netcat-openbsd aircrack-ng ansible obs-studio shotcut kdenlive handbrake audacity gimp inkscape blender krita libreoffice ranger fd-find ripgrep libgl1 libglib2.0-0 libsm6 libxext6 libxrender-dev libgomp1 libvulkan1 linux-headers-generic systemd btop aria2 stow mpv
curl -LO https://go.dev/dl/go1.23.4.linux-amd64.tar.gz && sudo rm -rf /usr/local/go && sudo tar -C /usr/local -xzf go1.23.4.linux-amd64.tar.gz && rm -f go1.23.4.linux-amd64.tar.gz
sudo apt-get install -y docker-ce docker-ce-cli containerd.io docker-buildx-plugin docker-compose-plugin
curl -fsSL https://pkgs.k8s.io/core:/stable:/v1.32/deb/Release.key | sudo gpg --dearmor -o /etc/apt/keyrings/kubernetes-apt-keyring.gpg && sudo apt-get install -y kubectl
curl -fsSL https://apt.releases.hashicorp.com/gpg | sudo gpg --dearmor -o /etc/apt/keyrings/hashicorp.gpg && sudo apt-get install -y terraform
curl https://awscli.amazonaws.com/awscli-exe-linux-x86_64.zip -o awscliv2.zip && unzip -o awscliv2.zip && sudo ./aws/install && rm -rf aws awscliv2.zip
cargo install eza du-dust procs bottom hyperfine tokei bandwhich tre-command tealdeer bore-cli xsv

go install github.com/jesseduffield/lazygit@latest github.com/x-motemen/ghq@latest github.com/charmbracelet/mods@latest github.com/charmbracelet/gum@latest github.com/dundee/gdu/v5/cmd/gdu@latest github.com/sachaos/viddy@latest github.com/sharkdp/fd@latest
pipx install poetry pdm hatch copier httpie glances thefuck tldr yt-dlp gallery-dl pygments cookiecutter black ruff mypy

uv venv ${HOME}/.local/share/aimas/venvs/ai-ml && uv pip install --python ${HOME}/.local/share/aimas/venvs/ai-ml/bin/python torch torchvision torchaudio --index-url https://download.pytorch.org/whl/cpu tensorflow-cpu transformers datasets accelerate sentence-transformers diffusers openai anthropic huggingface-hub jupyterlab ipython ipywidgets numpy pandas matplotlib seaborn scikit-learn scipy opencv-python Pillow rembg onnxruntime tqdm rich

uv venv ${HOME}/.local/share/aimas/venvs/scrape && uv pip install --python ${HOME}/.local/share/aimas/venvs/scrape/bin/python beautifulsoup4 scrapy selenium requests httpx aiohttp playwright yt-dlp gallery-dl newspaper3k trafilatura brozzler hakrawler waybackpack fake-useragent scrapy-fake-useragent

uv venv ${HOME}/.local/share/aimas/venvs/ai-cli && uv pip install --python ${HOME}/.local/share/aimas/venvs/ai-cli/bin/python gpt4all shell-gpt aider-chat open-interpreter litellm par-gpt tgpt chatblade llm llm-ollama private-gpt crewai agentops langchain langchain-community langchain-ollama langchain-openai semantic-kernel haystack-ai smol-dev fastchat
docker run -d -p 3000:8080 -v open-webui:/app/backend/data --name open-webui --restart always ghcr.io/open-webui/open-webui:main

items.name: ngrok
items.cmd: curl -s https://ngrok-agent.s3.amazonaws.com/ngrok.asc | sudo tee /etc/apt/trusted.gpg.d/ngrok.asc >/dev/null && echo 'deb https://ngrok-agent.s3.amazonaws.com buster main' | sudo tee /etc/apt/sources.list.d/ngrok.list && sudo apt update && sudo apt install ngrok -y

items.name: chisel
items.cmd: curl -L https://github.com/jpillora/chisel/releases/download/v1.9.1/chisel_1.9.1_linux_amd64.gz | gunzip -c | sudo tee /usr/local/bin/chisel >/dev/null && sudo chmod +x /usr/local/bin/chisel
